title: Teamsterz Street Kings Die Cast City Vehicle - Red Express Bus
description: Teamsterz Travel takes you wherever you want. If a passenger is on the road, the Teamsterz Street Kings The Cast City Vehicle is here! You only decide where you want to go, and the bus does the rest. You can travel to another city by bus, take the bus that takes you to the airport because you want to go on holiday by plane, take the city bus when you arrive to a new city or country. The fun continues with new adventures! Once you have decided where to go, you can now take a seat at the window of the bus or with years of experience as experienced passengers safely bring them to their destination. When you collect all the buses, you can experience an uninterrupted gaming experience. Let the journey begin! It helps children to enjoy themselves while encouraging the development of their imagination and creativity by creating new stories. Games they play with friends contribute to their socializing. Encourages curiosity of the collection. There are 3 different models, including Red Express Bus, White Airport Bus and Blue City Bus. Bus dimensions: 18.5 cm, box dimensions: 22.5 x 5 x 9 cm, weight: 0.210 kg
